title: Geraniospermum ferulaceum
taxonomy: Geraniospermum ferulaceum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae. The classification of Geraniospermum ferulaceum is typically grouped under the kingdom Plantae. Further classification places it in the clade Angiosperms, which includes flowering plants. This plant is often placed in the order Gentianales, a group of plants that includes gentians and oleander. The classification of Geraniospermum ferulaceum also includes its family Apocynaceae, which includes plants like periwinkle and Madagascar periwinkle.
